studyName: Somatic Mutational Analysis by Exome Sequencing Endometrial Carcinosarcomas

tables.description: Sample ID, body site where sample was collected, analyte type, tumor status of sample, histological type of sample, primary tumor or metastasis, primary tumor location, and name of the center which conducted sequencing of samples obtained from participants with endometrial carcinosarcomas and involved in the "Somatic Mutational Analysis by Exome Sequencing Endometrial Carcinosarcomas" project.

variables.name: BODY SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: PRIMARY_METASTATIC_TUMOR
variables.description: Primary tumor, metastasis, or transformed cell line

variables.name: SEQUENCING_CENTER
variables.description: Name of the center which conducted sequencing

tables.description: Subject ID, consent group, and affection status of participants with endometrial carcinosarcomas tumors and involved in the "Somatic Mutational Analysis by Exome Sequencing Endometrial Carcinosarcomas" project.

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Case control status of the subject

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

tables.description: Subject ID, sample ID, and sample use variable obtained from participants with endometrial carcinosarcomas and involved in the "Somatic Mutational Analysis by Exome Sequencing Endometrial Carcinosarcomas" project.
Subject ID and sex of participants with endometrial carcinosarcomas and involved in the "Somatic Mutational Analysis by Exome Sequencing Endometrial Carcinosarcomas" project.
